perimenopause_wellness.name: Perimenopause & Women's Wellness
perimenopause_wellness.viewer_persona: A woman in her 40s to mid-50s who feels like a stranger in her own life. Her mood shifts without warning. She is exhausted in a way sleep does not fix. She loves her family but feels invisible inside it.

womens_mental_health.name: Women's Mental Health
womens_mental_health.viewer_persona: A woman 25 to 45 who has been told her feelings are too much for most of her life. She overthinks at night. She rehearses conversations. She apologises reflexively. She knows something is not right but does not feel she deserves help.
